head.title: Holiday & Home Parks | Blacks Solicitors
head.description: We understand the pressures of managing a successful holiday or residential park. That is why we take the time to get to know your business, your goals, and the challenges you face. Then we work with you to find solutions that deliver real results. As an Associate Member of the Holiday and Residential Parks Association and a member of the National Caravan Council, we stay closely connected to the sector. Whether you are buying a new park, selling part of your portfolio, or dealing with day to day operational issues, we can help you move forward with clarity and control.

Whether you are buying a new park, selling part of your portfolio, or dealing with day to day operational issues, we can help you move forward with clarity and control.

blocks.html:
Holiday & Home Parks

We understand the pressures of managing a successful holiday or residential park. That is why we take the time to get to know your business, your goals, and the challenges you face. Then we work with you to find solutions that deliver real results. As an Associate Member of the Holiday and Residential Parks Association and a member of the National Caravan Council, we stay closely connected to the sector. Whether you are buying a new park, selling part of your portfolio, or dealing with day to day operational issues, we can help you move forward with clarity and control.

Home
Holiday & Home Parks

Our expertise covers

Commercial agreements

Running a park means dealing with agreements every day. They need to protect your business and reflect how your park operates. We help you put clear, practical contracts in place that work in the real world.

‍

Corporate services

No two parks are the same. We take time to understand your park business, then give straightforward, commercially focused advice that supports your goals.

‍

Disputes

Disputes can disrupt your park quickly. We work closely with you to resolve issues in a way that protects your park business and keeps things moving.

‍

Employment and HR management

Your people are central to how your park runs. We provide clear, practical support on employment matters, helping you manage your team with confidence.

‍

Intellectual property

Your park’s brand and ideas have real value. We help you protect and make the most of your intellectual property so your park business can grow.

‍

Planning

Planning rules can be complex for parks. We give clear, practical guidance to help you move your park projects forward with confidence.

‍

Regulation and compliance

Parks operate in a sector that changes regularly. Keeping up with new rules is essential. We help you stay compliant, manage risk, and keep your park running smoothly.

‍

Sale and purchase

Buying or selling a park is a major step. We guide you through the process with clear, practical advice and work closely with other professionals to keep your transaction on track.

‍

Succession and estate planning

Planning for the future of your park matters. We help you put clear plans in place to protect your assets and pass your park business on with confidence.

‍

Individuals

Private Wealth & Succession

Protecting assets, planning estates, and securing your legacy.

Private Wealth & Succession

From everyday matters to complex challenges, these are some of the services clients come to us for most often.

Typical matters we advise on

Running a business or organisation comes with a wide range of legal responsibilities. Our team provides tailored advice on the issues most commonly faced in your sector - helping you stay compliant, resolve disputes efficiently, and protect your commercial interests.

Speak to an expert

Corporate Governance

We help businesses build strong governance frameworks that support growth, manage risk, and meet regulatory standards.

Corporate Reorganisation

We advise on complex corporate restructurings, from integrations and carve-outs to capital changes and hive-ups, working closely with your wider advisory team to keep things on track.

Disciplinary Proceedings

Confident handling of disciplinary issues protects your business from tribunal claims, reputational damage and disruption to team morale.

Intellectual Property Enforcement

If your intellectual property is under threat, we act quickly to protect your brand, products and reputation.

Lasting Powers of Attorney

If you want someone you trust to make decisions for you if you can’t, a Lasting Power of Attorney is essential.

Lifetime Trusts

If you want to protect your assets and plan for the future, we can help.

Making a Will

If you want certainty over what happens to your estate, a Will gives you peace of mind.

Restructuring

Thinking about restructuring your business? Done right, it can bring clarity, unlock growth and strengthen your position for the future. Done wrong, it can create costly legal and commercial risks.

Strategic Planning and Development Advice

Strategic planning advice to manage risk, unlock opportunity, and deliver successful development.

Terms & Conditions

Your terms and conditions protect your business. If you would like to review or update your terms and conditions, we can assist you.

Tribunal Representation

Facing a claim against your business? Early legal advice can make all the difference. we can help protect your position.

Get clear, confident legal advice today

We’re here to help you take your next step with confidence

Call us today

Send an enquiry

He made me feel like my thoughts and views were valid and also explained situations where I wasn't understanding the full picture.
